caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the instrument cluster. The dashboard displays various gauges and indicators, including the speedometer, fuel gauge, oil pressure gauge, oil temperature gauge, coolant temperature gauge, and voltage gauge. The digital display in the center shows the current speed as 0 mph and the total mileage as 127213 miles. The "Unleaded Fuel Only" label is visible above the digital display. The "Door Ajar" warning light is illuminated on the right side of the dashboard, indicating that one of the car doors is not fully closed. The camera remains steady, providing a clear and detailed view of the dashboard's layout and information.
